title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 6–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #5 as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank you for reading the manga, every- one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You can read our successful manga...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will these individuals be able to return to their world?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: OR WILL THEY MEET THAT LEGENDARY CREW?

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 9 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
